resources.string: Access is currently restricted. Please try again later.
Access is restricted or risk control was triggered. Please try again later.
Access restricted. Please try again later.
Added to download queue (%1$s items), skipped existing (%2$s items): %3$s
Please allow Eara to install apps from unknown sources, then continue the installation
Already exists locally, not saved again
Already exists locally, skipped download (%1$s items): %2$s
\"This audio can\'t be used for Listen Together\"
Authentication expired. Please log in again.
Automatic update check on startup disabled
Automatically check for updates on startup
A batch task is in progress. Cancel it before %1$s
A batch task is in progress. Please cancel it before deleting.
Bound to %1$s and cloud sync completed
0° is centered, 90° is right, and 270° is left.
Cloud sync candidates: %1$s possible matches (tap the matching work to confirm sync)
Connection timed out. Please try again later.
Continue playback when wired/Bluetooth headphones or other external outputs are connected
Customers who bought this also bought
Deletion failed, please try again later
Use the Android version for full playback features. The desktop version provides library management and settings sync.
This directory is already included in an existing scan directory
This directory contains an existing scan directory. Remove the subdirectory first.
Directory does not exist and was removed from the local library
This directory will be removed from the list and will no longer be scanned.
DLsite Play failed to get signature (%1$s)
DLsite Play failed to load. Please try again later.
DLsite Play returned an empty directory tree
DLsite Play returned an empty signature
DLsite Play signature response is missing url/params
Downloaded file is invalid. Please download it again.
Each slider corresponds to a center frequency band. Move up to boost and down to cut that band.
End time cannot be earlier than start time
Please enter a custom preset name.
Please enter a filter preset name.
Please enter a new group name.
Please enter a new group name.
Please enter a new list name.
Please enter a new list name.
Enter the number of minutes for the sleep timer.
Please enter an RJ number. Cloud sync will run automatically after saving.
Please enter a valid RJ number
Please enter a valid work ID
Operation failed. Please try again later
Exact phrase search (wrapped in English double quotes): e.g. \\\"simplified chinese ear licking\\\" searches multiple words as one exact phrase
Exclude search (space and minus): \\\"school -uniform\\\" excludes specified keywords
Failed to add to favorites. Please try again.
Failed to add to group. Please try again
Failed to add to list. Please try again.
Failed to get directory tree from DLsite Play (%1$s)
Failed to load online resources. Please try again later
Failed to set cover. Please check and try again
The farther the distance, the softer and slightly more attenuated the sound becomes.
Gradually adjust playback loudness toward this target value (smoother changes, better for leveling across different audio). Recommended range: -24 to -14.
The higher the intensity, the more pronounced the scene characteristics. Presets like Telephone and Muffled Under Blanket become more recognizable at high intensity.
The higher the speed, the faster the stereo image moves.
Higher values play faster (affects tempo and duration).
Higher values raise the pitch, lower values lower it (playback duration may not change).
Ignored the remaining pending items in this round
Invert: swaps the left and right channels; Clone: copies one channel to the other side.
Please log in to DLsite before using \\\"Purchased\\\" search
Please log in to DLsite first (requires the Cookie from play.dlsite.com)
Please log in first before using\\
Login expired, please log in again
Login failed, please check your account and password
Login has expired. Please sign in again and retry
Long press and drag, then release to save immediately

Loudness leveling: pulls overall loudness toward the target value, which is useful for matching volume across different audio; threshold: keeps loudness within a range, more like auto gain + suppression.
m3u8 streaming is not currently supported, please download the audio file first
Main process completed, %1$s items remain to be confirmed
\\\", meaning multiple words will be searched as an exact phrase
Missing RJ code, unable to load
Network connection failed, please check your network
No app found to open this
No files in the current directory
No local albums have been scanned yet
No login form found and no logged-in state detected
No relevant content found. Please check and try again.
Off: the background and cover stay centered and static
Online audio does not support tag management yet
Online files do not support content preview yet. Please open them with an external app.
Online playback is not currently supported for this audio. Please download it first.
Only local library albums support manual RJ binding
Only local library albums support manual work ID binding
Only LRC, SRT, and VTT lyric files are supported
Please open with an external app
Pause playback immediately when the speaker, wired/Bluetooth headphones are disconnected, or Bluetooth is turned off
Pause playback when another music or video app takes audio focus; normal notification sounds will not trigger it.
Pause when other apps play audio/video
PDF files do not support direct preview yet
Playback failed. Please try again later.
Press Back again to exit the app
Preview of this file type is not supported yet
Preview refresh failed. Please try again later.
In progress: %1$s Wait for it to finish or cancel it before %2$s
In progress: %1$s Please wait for it to finish or cancel it before syncing.
Purchased library authentication failed (401). Please log in to DLsite again.
Refresh failed, please try again later
Release does not include an APK asset
Rename the tag or delete this user tag.
To replace lyrics for online audio, please download the audio locally first
Request failed, please try again later
Request timed out, please try again later
Rescan failed. Please check the directory and try again
Rotate: rotate your phone to preview other areas of the cover
Rotate your phone to view the full cover image
Saved to local library (%1$s items), skipped existing (%2$s items)
Scan failed. Check directory permissions and try again
Search failed, please try again later
OR search (separated by English vertical bars): \\\"school|uniform\\\", meaning one or more of the specified keywords may be included
AND search (space-separated): \\\"school uniform\\\" means all specified keywords must be included
Selected items are already in the play queue
The server is taking a break, please try again later
Set successfully, playback is expected to pause at %1$s
Shift the overall sound toward the left or right channel. Mutually exclusive with \\\"Sound source direction/Auto surround\\\".
Simulates common spaces or transmission media through band limiting, soundstage narrowing, and delayed reflections. It is recommended to choose a preset first, then fine-tune the intensity.
Slice overlaps with an existing slice
If speaker, headphones, or Bluetooth output is disconnected during playback, playback pauses immediately to prevent sound from suddenly playing out loud.
The start point falls within an existing slice
Swipe: use two fingers to drag for preview on the player-page cover and lyrics-page background, and the left-side drawer swipe will be temporarily disabled
Sync failed: album information not found
Sync failed: search results are not unique
Sync failed. Please try again later
A sync task is in progress, please try again later
This tag will be removed from all user annotations.
Tap files to add or remove them from the selection
Tap a user tag to remove it
There was a network connection problem
Too many requests, please try again later
Unable to determine the DLsite Play work ID
Unable to open GitHub release page
Unable to open the install permission page
Unable to open: path is empty
Network connection failed. Check your network and try again.
Used for background playback controls and the lock screen media panel
The volume is about to be adjusted to %1$s%%, which exceeds 40%% and may cause hearing damage. After confirmation, this warning will not be shown again during this app launch.
When enabled, media control buttons on the system lock screen and notification bar will be hidden as much as possible, while keeping the foreground notification required for background playback.
When enabled, the stereo image moves automatically based on the speed.

When headphones, Bluetooth headphones, USB audio, HDMI, AUX, or other external outputs are connected, if the player is currently paused it will automatically try to resume playback; the phone speaker does not trigger this.
When off, the mini player bar at the bottom of the app is hidden, and no extra space is reserved for it at the bottom of pages.
When Pause is tapped, the volume will gradually fade to 0 over the set duration before actually pausing.
When volume exceeds this value, it will be reduced automatically so it does not go over the threshold.
When the volume falls below this value, it will be automatically boosted close to this threshold.
When you tap play, the volume will smoothly rise from low to normal over the set duration.
This will permanently delete the file “%1$s” and cannot be undone.
This will permanently delete files in the “%1$s” directory and cannot be undone.
This will remove the album from the local library and try to delete the local files.
You need to log in to DLsite first to use purchased playback/download
Are you sure you want to delete group \\\"%1$s\\\"? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete list \\\"%1$s\\\"? This action cannot be undone.
